item.title: Australia | Latest News Headlines | Nine.com.au
item.description: The latest Australia news, articles and analysis from Nine.com.au

item.title: Middle East | Latest News Headlines | Nine.com.au
item.description: The latest Middle East news, articles and analysis from Nine.com.au

item.title: Aussie fast-food chain Guzman y Gomez facing legal action after abruptly shutting down US operations
item.description: Guzman Y Gomez is facing a class action lawsuit after allegations it failed to give its employees enough notice after shutting down its operations in the USA.

item.title: 'Far better off': Australian bosses warn of mass exodus to NZ and USA after sweeping tax changes
item.description: E﻿ntrepreneurial Australians may be lured abroad to New Zealand or the United States after the federal government overhauled the tax treatment for investments, business owners say.

item.title: From prison to AI boom: Oliver Curtis now worth $1.25 billion
item.description: Oliver Curtis walked out of a NSW prison on ﻿June 23, 2017 after serving 12 months of a two-year sentence for conspiring to commit 45 illicit trades trades, which banked him and his former pal John Hartmann $1.43 million.

item.title: Aussies likely to get momentary interest rate reprieve after surprise inflation read
item.description: I﻿nflation in Australia has cooled in the 12 months to April 2026, falling to 4.2 per cent from 4.6 per cent the month prior.

item.title: KPMG chief executive resigns over firm's management of whistleblower allegations
item.description: T﻿he management of a whistleblower's allegations has ultimately been found to be insufficient.

item.title: Officeworks to offshore jobs to India and Philippines in $15 million restructure
item.description: Officeworks will offshore hundreds of local jobs﻿ to India and the Philippines as part of the retailer's $15 million cost-saving restructure, which it had flagged during the brand's sluggish half-yearly results. Read more.
